cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/rotkit/__init__.py b/rotkit/__init__.py
index 1e7adf4..2cbe590 100644
--- a/rotkit/__init__.py
+++ b/rotkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,9 @@
 
 def reverse(xs):
     return xs[::-1]
+
+def rotate(xs, n):
+    if not xs:
+        return []
+    n %= len(xs)
+    return xs[-n:] + xs[:-n] if n else xs[:]

cases.name: no_modulo_overflow
cases.diff:
diff --git a/rotkit/__init__.py b/rotkit/__init__.py
index 1e7adf4..7689fac 100644
--- a/rotkit/__init__.py
+++ b/rotkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,6 @@
 
 def reverse(xs):
     return xs[::-1]
+
+def rotate(xs, n):
+    return xs[-n:] + xs[:-n]

cases.name: rotates_left
cases.diff:
diff --git a/rotkit/__init__.py b/rotkit/__init__.py
index 1e7adf4..b30d5a2 100644
--- a/rotkit/__init__.py
+++ b/rotkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,9 @@
 
 def reverse(xs):
     return xs[::-1]
+
+def rotate(xs, n):
+    if not xs:
+        return []
+    n %= len(xs)
+    return xs[n:] + xs[:n]
